data.description: Steps to reproduce Install an extension Return to the main section of the application. Open the extension selection bar. The installed extension does not appear. Uninstall the extension from the extension manager. Reinstall the same exte...

}

    <script type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"DiscussionForumPosting","headline":"Installed Extension Disappears From Selection","articleBody":"### Steps to reproduce\n\n1. Install an extension\n2. Return to the main section of the application.\n3. Open the extension selection bar.\n4. The installed extension does not appear.\n5. Uninstall the extension from the extension manager.\n6. Reinstall the same extension.\n7. The extension still does not appear in the selection bar.\n\n### Expected behavior\n\nThe installed extension should appear in the extension selection bar without any issues.\n\n### Actual behavior\n\nThe extension installs successfully but does not show up in the selection bar. Reinstalling the extension rarely fixes the issue, and in many cases it has no effect.\n\n### Cloudstream version and commit hash\n\n4.6.1\n\n### Android version\n\n15\n\n### Logcat\n\n```java\n\n```\n\n### Other details\n\nMultiple users in my Telegram group have reported experiencing the same issue.\nAll media options and categories in the app are enabled, so the extension is not being filtered out.\nThe extension installs normally and appears in the “Installed Extensions” list, but it does not show up in the selection menu after installation.\nRemoving and reinstalling the extension sometimes makes it appear, but only with a very low success rate. In many cases, the extension never appears regardless of how many times it is reinstalled.\n\n### Acknowledgements\n\n- [x] I am sure my issue is related to the app and **NOT some extension**.\n- [x] I have searched the existing issues and this is a new ticket, **NOT** a duplicate or related to another open issue.\n- [x] I have written a short but informative title.\n- [x] I have updated the app to pre-release version **[Latest](https://github.com/recloudstream/cloudstream/releases)**.\n- [x] I will fill out all of the requested information in this form.","author":{"url":"https://github.com/Kraptor123","@type":"Person","name":"Kraptor123"},"datePublished":"2025-11-17T12:56:30.000Z","interactionStatistic":{"@type":"InteractionCounter","interactionType":"https://schema.org/CommentAction","userInteractionCount":14},"url":"https://github.com/2225/cloudstream/issues/2225"}</script>

data-turbolinks="false"><div class="markdown-body NewMarkdownViewer-module__safe-html-box__ZT1eD"><h3 dir="auto">Steps to reproduce</h3>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Install an extension</li>
<li>Return to the main section of the application.</li>
<li>Open the extension selection bar.</li>
<li>The installed extension does not appear.</li>
<li>Uninstall the extension from the extension manager.</li>
<li>Reinstall the same extension.</li>
<li>The extension still does not appear in the selection bar.</li>
</ol>
<h3 dir="auto">Expected behavior</h3>
<p dir="auto">The installed extension should appear in the extension selection bar without any issues.</p>
<h3 dir="auto">Actual behavior</h3>
<p dir="auto">The extension installs successfully but does not show up in the selection bar. Reinstalling the extension rarely fixes the issue, and in many cases it has no effect.</p>
<h3 dir="auto">Cloudstream version and commit hash</h3>
<p dir="auto">4.6.1</p>
<h3 dir="auto">Android version</h3>
<p dir="auto">15</p>
<h3 dir="auto">Logcat</h3>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-java notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre class="notranslate"></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container position-absolute right-0 top-0">

<h3 dir="auto">Other details</h3>
<p dir="auto">Multiple users in my Telegram group have reported experiencing the same issue.<br>
All media options and categories in the app are enabled, so the extension is not being filtered out.<br>
The extension installs normally and appears in the “Installed Extensions” list, but it does not show up in the selection menu after installation.<br>
Removing and reinstalling the extension sometimes makes it appear, but only with a very low success rate. In many cases, the extension never appears regardless of how many times it is reinstalled.</p>
